Community Dinner: Last Sunday of the month, 5pm-6pm
item.operatingHours:
For the pantry: must bring ID for all adults and birth certificates for children, and current electrical bill. 

You can receive up to 9 boxes each calendar year, and there must be 30 days in between each visit.
